classification_note: coal_mw is the hour's offered MW from resources classified as coal (pasa alias + hand-verified abbreviations + a fuel-tolerant fleet match; coverage stated). A min-stable floor carved from this series was MEASURED INERT before shipping: the coal fleet already offers its committed tranche at the price floor (the 40 percent carve left the books byte-identical), so commitment behavior is in the bids, not missing from them.
note: Observed per-grid hourly offer stacks from IEMOP's real-time generation offers (RTDOE) plus self-scheduled nominations (RTDNE, price-taking at the offer floor: capacity that runs whenever the grid runs and submits no curve): each hour is the book at the hour's first 5-minute interval, all segments pooled and compacted to at most 48 price blocks (MW-weighted merges). Prices PhP/kWh, floor to cap as offered. Gate: each grid-hour's book must cover that hour's dispatched generation or the day is refused.
